nasb.text: We also asked them their names so as to inform you, and that we might write down the names of the men who were at their head.

esv.text: We also asked them their names, for your information, that we might write down the names of their leaders.

cnv.text: 為了奏知大王，就問他們的名字，記錄他們首領的名。

ccb.text: 我们又问他们的名字，好记下他们首领的名字禀告王。
